title: Abu Dhabi approves $6.2 billion gas project to boost UAE supply
summary_full: Abu Dhabi's National Oil Company will invest $6.2 billion to develop the Umm Shaif Gas Cap to expand natural gas production and liquefied natural gas exports.
summary_public: Abu Dhabi's National Oil Company will invest $6.2 billion to develop the Umm Shaif Gas Cap to expand natural gas production and liquefied natural gas exports.
